meta.disclaimer: Nigerian solar prices vary widely by vendor, location, condition (new vs used) and date, and track the USD/NGN rate (~1,500-1,600/USD in 2026). ~95% of panels, inverters and lithium cells are imported, so prices shift month to month. Every entry carries a source URL, a date_seen, and a confidence tag. Re-verify before quoting an end user.

confidence_key.high: exact price read from a live Nigerian product page
confidence_key.medium: vendor category/aggregator listing or dated price-list blog
confidence_key.low: range midpoint, premium-brand estimate, or stale (pre-2024) figure

vendors.name: Arnergy
vendors.notes: Venture-backed (Breakthrough Energy). Z-Lite lease, zero down, fixed monthly over 5-10 years. 1,800+ systems. Custom quotes.

vendors.name: Blue Camel Energy
vendors.notes: Indigenous, solar assembly plant + training academy in Kaduna. End-to-end. No published prices.

vendors.name: Rubitec Solar
vendors.notes: Founded 2004, COREN-certified. Mini-grids (Gbamugbamu, Ogun). Prices not published.

vendors.name: Sosai Renewable Energies
vendors.notes: Woman-led social enterprise (Habiba Ali), founded 2010. ~2M reached. Prices not published.

vendors.name: Sun King (Greenlight Planet)
vendors.notes: Global leader, in Nigeria since 2011. EasyBuy: small deposit then installments via mobile money. Quote via store/agent.

vendors.name: d.light
vendors.notes: Daily PAYG via mobile money (~$25 deposit + ~$1/day over 24 months). $7.4M Nigeria financing.

vendors.name: Lumos Nigeria (MTN Mobile Electricity)
vendors.notes: Down payment (~$50) then ~50c/day prepaid up to 5 years, then ownership. 88,000+ systems.

vendors.name: Daystar Power (Shell)
vendors.notes: Acquired by Shell 2022. SaaS: pay per-kWh or monthly, zero capex. 400+ installs, 150MW+. C&I, not residential.

vendors.name: Starsight Energy
vendors.notes: Pure-play C&I, zero upfront, pay for energy. ~48MW + ~35MWh. Not residential.

vendors.name: Rensource Energy
vendors.notes: Market micro-utility. Sabon Gari (Kano) powers 11,000+ shops. Subscription tariffs.

vendors.name: Cloud Energy Photoelectric
vendors.notes: Founded 2013. PUBLISHES PRICES (sample systems ~N1.0M-N1.7M). Installation + after-sales.

vendors.name: Auxano Solar
vendors.notes: Nigeria's first private solar PV assembly factory (100MW+, 2023). Backed by Shell All On, BOI, REA. Custom quotes.

vendors.name: EM-ONE Energy Solutions
vendors.notes: 300+ microgrids. Univ. of Abuja 3.1MWp, Mabushi 1.52MW. Utility/institutional EPC, not retail.

vendors.name: Green Village Electricity (GVE)
vendors.notes: Founded 2009. Wuse Market (Abuja) 1MW interconnected mini-grid. 8,900+ households. Tariffs/connection fees.

vendors.name: ASOLAR Nigeria
vendors.coverage: Abuja HQ, national via Access agents
vendors.notes: Solar Power Naija partner. Products ~N150k-N300k over ~6 months via Access Bank. ~80,000 units.

vendors.name: SolarKobo
vendors.notes: In-house engineers, financing, online cost estimator. Quotes via sales@solarkobo.com. Useful price blog.

vendors.name: Jumia (solar store)
vendors.notes: 2,700+ products, PUBLISHES PRICES. Hardware only (no install). Best for component price benchmarking.

vendors.name: Konga (solar store)
vendors.notes: Dedicated solar categories, PUBLISHES PRICES. Hardware only.

vendors.name: Mercury Direct
vendors.notes: Publishes complete-system bundle prices by kVA (1.6 to 10kVA). Good itemized BOM reference.

vendors.name: Solar Depot Nigeria
vendors.notes: Publishes SunPower package prices with full BOM. Premium tier.

vendors.name: Felicity Solar Nigeria
vendors.notes: Manufacturer with a strong NG distributor network; widely resold on Jumia (~₦386k to ₦1.65M).

vendors.name: Zit Electronics (Zit.ng)
vendors.notes: Electronics e-tailer with an inverters/batteries category; sample bundle ~₦1.67M.

vendors.name: Maypatronic
vendors.notes: Installer/retailer; data-driven sizing; most installs in 48 to 72 hours.

vendors.name: Me3 Energy
vendors.notes: Since 2002; NSE-registered engineers; 2-year warranty, 24/7 after-sales.

vendors.name: StellarMart
vendors.notes: Owned by Royal De Beaver Ltd; distribution and installation.

vendors.name: Sygnite Power & Energy
vendors.notes: Official Zola partner; 500+ installs; PAYG/installment home systems.

vendors.name: Greco Power & Energy
vendors.notes: Since 2012; full value chain incl. project finance and EPC.

vendors.name: EnergyMall
vendors.notes: Warranties + after-sales installation; extended support hours.

vendors.name: SMK Solar Nigeria
vendors.notes: Own-brand hardware tuned for Nigeria; since 2016.

vendors.name: SunFi
vendors.notes: Fintech: lease-to-own and subscription; manages 1500+ systems (~4MW).

vendors.name: Eden Power
vendors.notes: Plug-and-play portable solar generator combos (296Wh/518Wh kits).

vendors.name: Beebeejump
vendors.notes: Affordable/entry-level household solar; PAYG/installments.

vendors.name: 9Solar
vendors.notes: Local manufacturing focus; wholesale and DIY.

vendors.name: Nedcomoaks
vendors.notes: Developer of fully solar-powered residential estates (solar bundled into property).
